data.title: Probe Gold Boosts Resources with New Reports
data.description:
Probe Metals (TSE:PRB) has released an update.

Probe Gold has significantly increased its gold resources with a 77% rise in Measured and Indicated (M&I) resources and a 131% boost in Inferred resources at its Val-d’Or East Properties. The company has also filed technical reports for its Novador, McKenzie Break, and Croinor gold projects, highlighting strong open pit potential and ongoing development. With a 50,000-meter drill program underway, Probe Gold is advancing its projects with promising growth potential.

For further insights into TSE:PRB stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Johnson Matthey CFO Sells Vested Shares on London Exchange
data.description:
Johnson Matthey (GB:JMAT) has released an update.

Johnson Matthey PLC’s Chief Financial Officer, Stephen Oxley, has conducted a significant transaction involving the vesting and partial sale of shares under the company’s Restricted Share Plan. Of the 41,500 vested shares, Oxley sold 19,554 shares at a price of £15.255127 each, totaling £298,298.75, on the London Stock Exchange. This transaction highlights insider activity that might interest investors in the company’s stock movements.

For further insights into GB:JMAT stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Jefferies Financial Group Reports Strong Revenue Growth
data.description:
Jefferies ( (JEF) ) just unveiled an update.

Jefferies Financial Group has posted significant growth, with net revenues soaring to $6.3 billion and investment banking revenues reaching $3.1 billion, marking their second highest levels. The firm attributes this success to a consistent long-term strategy and a dynamic approach to market opportunities, outperforming peers in investment banking and capital markets. With a focus on disciplined expense management and returning capital to shareholders, Jefferies continues to strengthen its market position and is poised for further growth.

Find detailed analytics on JEF stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: mDR Limited’s Strategic Securities Transactions in October
data.description:
mDR Limited (SG:Y3D) has released an update.

mDR Limited has made significant moves in the stock market, acquiring quoted securities worth approximately S$5.23 million and selling others valued at around S$4.4 million between October 10 and October 18, 2024. These transactions represent 5.4% and 4.6%, respectively, of the company’s latest audited net tangible assets, highlighting mDR’s active management of its investment portfolio.

For further insights into SG:Y3D stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Samson Holding Moves Towards Privatization and Delisting
data.description:
Samson Holding (DE:S9K) has released an update.

Samson Holding Ltd. is set to go private through a scheme of arrangement approved by its shareholders, which also includes the withdrawal of its listing from the Hong Kong Stock Exchange. The company’s board has decided to change the board lot size from 1,000 to 800,000 shares, pending the effectiveness of the scheme. These developments come as part of a broader strategic move by the Offeror, Glory Mount (HK) Limited.

For further insights into DE:S9K stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Norbit ASA Registers Share Capital Increase
data.description:
Norbit ASA (DE:4NK) has released an update.

Norbit ASA has successfully registered a share capital increase in the Norwegian Register of Business Enterprises, following its recent employee incentive share purchase program. The company’s share capital now stands at NOK 6,375,002.70, divided into 63,750,027 shares. This move is part of Norbit’s commitment to promoting sustainability and innovation across its Oceans, Connectivity, and Product Innovation & Realization segments.

For further insights into DE:4NK stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Guaranty Bancshares Reports Stable Q3 2024 Performance
data.description:
Guaranty Bancshares ( (GNTY) ) has issued an announcement.

Guaranty Bancshares, Inc. reported stable financial performance for Q3 2024, with net income of $7.4 million and a rise in net interest margin to 3.33%. The company benefited from increased net interest income and strategic balance sheet management, including repaying debt and repurchasing shares. Strong asset quality and solid liquidity positions, alongside a consistent core deposit base, position the company well for future growth opportunities as economic conditions improve.

Learn more about GNTY stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Oberon AIM VCT: Chairman Increases Shareholding
data.description:
New Century AIM VCT 2 (GB:OVCT) has released an update.

Geoffrey Gamble, Chairman of Oberon AIM VCT plc, has increased his stake in the company by acquiring 2,708 ordinary shares at 29.0p each, raising his total holding to 3.65% of the company’s share capital. This move highlights ongoing insider confidence and may attract the attention of investors interested in director dealings. With a total of 5,574,403 ordinary shares in issue, this acquisition is a notable event for shareholders to consider.

For further insights into GB:OVCT stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Cellularline Enhances Shareholder Value with Share Buyback
data.description:
Cellularline SpA (IT:CELL) has released an update.

Cellularline S.p.A. has recently repurchased 11,896 treasury shares, amounting to a total value of €31,286.42, as part of its ongoing buy-back program. This initiative underscores the company’s commitment to enhancing shareholder value while maintaining a strong presence in the smartphone and tablet accessories market. With products sold in over 60 countries, Cellularline continues to innovate at the forefront of the multimedia device accessories industry.

For further insights into IT:CELL stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Totm Technologies AGM Highlights Key Financial Resolutions
data.description:
Totm Technologies Limited (SG:42F) has released an update.

Totm Technologies Limited held its Annual General Meeting on September 26, 2024, where key resolutions, including the adoption of the Directors’ Statement and audited financial statements for the year ending May 31, 2024, were presented. The meeting was conducted in accordance with SGX Catalist Rules, with all motions decided by poll voting requiring a simple majority. The AGM was chaired by Mr. Low Chai Chong, with several board members and key management in attendance, highlighting the company’s commitment to transparency and shareholder engagement.

For further insights into SG:42F stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
